## Relic Shop System - Complete Exploration Report

### 1. **Data Types** (`LFPRelicTypes.h`)

**Relic Effect Enums:**
- `ELFPRelicEffectType` - Static relic effects: `RET_MaxHealthFlat`, `RET_AttackFlat`, `RET_DefenseFlat`, `RET_SpeedFlat`
- `ELFPRelicTargetAffiliation` - Target filtering: `RTA_Player`, `RTA_Enemy`, `RTA_Neutral`
- `ELFPRelicTriggerType` - Battle triggers: `RTT_BattleStart`, `RTT_RoundStart`, `RTT_RoundEnd`, `RTT_UnitTurnStart`, etc.
- `ELFPRelicConditionType` - Effect conditions: `RCT_None`, `RCT_HealthPercentBelow`, `RCT_StatValueAbove`, `RCT_HasRelic`, etc.
- `ELFPRelicStatType` - Stat types: `RST_Attack`, `RST_MaxHealth`, `RST_Speed`, `RST_PhysicalBlock`, `RST_SpellDefense`, `RST_AttackCount`, `RST_ActionCount`
- `ELFPRelicBattleEffectType` - Battle effects: `RBET_HealFlat`, `RBET_DamageFlat`, `RBET_ModifyStatFlat`, `RBET_ModifyStatPercent`, `RBET_AddTag`, `RBET_RemoveTag`
- `ELFPRelicDurationType` - Duration types: `RDT_Instant`, `RDT_UntilRoundEnd`, `RDT_UntilUnitTurnEnd`, `RDT_WhileConditionTrue`

**Relic Structs:**
- `FLFPRelicEffectEntry` - Single static effect (EffectType + Value)
- `FLFPRelicTargetFilter` - Target filtering rules (bAffectSelfOnly, Affiliations, Races, RequiredTags, BlockedTags)
- `FLFPRelicCondition` - Single condition (ConditionType, StatType, IntValue, FloatValue, RelicIDs array)
- `FLFPRelicBattleEffect` - Single battle effect (EffectType, StatType, IntValue, FloatValue, Tag)
- `FLFPRelicBattleRule` - Complete battle rule (RuleID, TriggerType, TargetFilter, Conditions array, Effects array, DurationType)
- `FLFPRelicSynergyRule` - Relic combination rule (SynergyID, RequiredRelicIDs, TriggerType, TargetFilter, Conditions, Effects, DurationType)
- `FLFPRelicDefinition` - Full relic definition (DisplayName, Icon, Description, Effects array, BattleRules array)

**Shop Structs:**
- `FLFPShopRelicEntry` - Shop item (RelicID, Price)
- `FLFPShopDefinition` - Complete shop (DisplayName, RelicList array of FLFPShopRelicEntry)

### 2. **Data Assets**

**LFPRelicDataAsset** (遗物注册表)
- File: `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPRelicDataAsset.h`
- Properties:
  - `TMap<FName, FLFPRelicDefinition> RelicMap` - RelicID → Definition lookup
  - `TArray<FLFPRelicSynergyRule> SynergyRules` - Global synergy rules
- Method: `FindRelicDefinition(FName RelicID, FLFPRelicDefinition& OutDefinition)` → bool

**LFPShopDataAsset** (商店配置表)
- File: `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPShopDataAsset.h`
- Properties:
  - `TMap<FName, FLFPShopDefinition> ShopMap` - ShopID → Shop Definition lookup
- Method: `FindShopDefinition(FName ShopID, FLFPShopDefinition& OutDefinition)` → bool

### 3. **Shop Widget** (`LFPShopWidget.h/.cpp`)

**UI Structure:**
- `Text_Title` - Shop title + owned relic count
- `Text_Gold` - Player gold display
- `Box_RelicList` - Vertical box with shop relic buttons
- `Box_OwnedRelicList` - Vertical box with owned relics
- `Image_SelectedRelic` - Selected relic icon
- `Text_SelectedName` - Selected relic name
- `Text_SelectedDescription` - Selected relic description + static effects
- `Text_SelectedPrice` - Selected relic price
- `Text_Status` - Availability status ("已拥有", "金币不足", "可购买")
- `Button_Purchase` - Buy button
- `Button_Close` - Close button

**Key Methods:**
- `Setup(ULFPGameInstance* GI, FName InShopID, const FLFPShopDefinition& InShopDefinition)` - Initialize widget
- `RefreshShopUI()` - Update entire UI
- `RefreshRelicList()` - Populate available relics with buttons
- `RefreshOwnedRelicList()` - Display owned relics
- `RefreshDetailPanel()` - Update selected relic details and button state
- `BuildEffectDescription(const FLFPRelicDefinition& Definition)` → FString - Format static effects for display
- `OnRelicButtonClicked()` - Handle relic selection
- `OnPurchaseClicked()` - Attempt purchase via `GI->TryPurchaseRelic()`
- `OnCloseClicked()` - Close and broadcast `OnClosed` delegate

**Delegate:**
- `FOnShopWidgetClosed OnClosed` - Fired when shop closes

### 4. **GameInstance Integration** (`LFPGameInstance.h/.cpp`)

**Relic/Shop Fields:**
```cpp
TObjectPtr<ULFPRelicDataAsset> RelicDataAsset;      // Configured in blueprint
TObjectPtr<ULFPShopDataAsset> ShopDataAsset;        // Configured in blueprint
TSet<FName> OwnedRelicIDs;                          // Runtime collection of owned relic IDs
int32 Gold = 0;                                     // Gold currency
int32 Food = 0;                                     // Food currency
```

**Key Methods:**

| Method | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `HasRelic(FName RelicID) → bool` | Check if relic is owned |
| `TryAddOwnedRelic(FName RelicID) → bool` | Add relic to collection (prevents duplicates) |
| `GetOwnedRelicIDsArray() → TArray<FName>` | Get all owned relic IDs as array |
| `FindRelicDefinition(FName RelicID, FLFPRelicDefinition& OutDef) → bool` | Look up relic in RelicDataAsset |
| `FindShopDefinition(FName ShopID, FLFPShopDefinition& OutDef) → bool` | Look up shop in ShopDataAsset |
| `TryPurchaseRelic(FName RelicID, int32 Price) → bool` | Spend gold → add relic → log success (refunds if add fails) |
| `ApplyOwnedRelicsToUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit) const` | Apply all owned relic static effects to unit |
| `AddGold(int32 Amount)` | Increase gold (positive or negative) |
| `SpendGold(int32 Amount) → bool` | Decrease gold if affordable |
| `CanAffordGold(int32 Amount) → bool` | Check if enough gold |

**Purchase Flow:**
```
TryPurchaseRelic(RelicID, Price)
  ├─ SpendGold(Price)
  ├─ TryAddOwnedRelic(RelicID)
  └─ Refund if TryAddOwnedRelic fails
```

### 5. **World Map Node Integration**

**LFPWorldMapData.h - FLFPWorldNodeRow struct:**
```cpp
ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType;  // Enum with WNT_Shop value
FName ShopID;                // Key to look up in ShopDataAsset
```

**LFPWorldMapNode.h - Actor properties:**
```cpp
ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType;
FName ShopID = NAME_None;   // Matches CSV data
```

**LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp - Shop Entry Logic:**

File path: `d:\UE_Projects\LFP2D\Source\LFP2D\WorldMap\LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp`

**Lines 422-465: EnterNode() method**
```cpp
void ALFPWorldMapPlayerController::EnterNode(ALFPWorldMapNode* Node)
{
    switch (Node->NodeType)
    {
    case ELFPWorldNodeType::WNT_Shop:
        OpenShop(Node, false);  // false = don't return to town on close
        break;
    // ... other cases
    }
}
```

**Lines 587-637: OpenShop() method**
```cpp
void ALFPWorldMapPlayerController::OpenShop(ALFPWorldMapNode* ShopNode, bool bReturnToTownOnClose)
{
    // 1. Get GameInstance
    ULFPGameInstance* GI = Cast<ULFPGameInstance>(GetGameInstance());
    
    // 2. Validate ShopID and find definition
    if (ShopNode->ShopID == NAME_None) return;
    
    FLFPShopDefinition ShopDefinition;
    if (!GI->FindShopDefinition(ShopNode->ShopID, ShopDefinition)) return;
    
    // 3. Create or show ShopWidget
    if (!ShopWidget)
    {
        ShopWidget = CreateWidget<ULFPShopWidget>(this, ShopWidgetClass);
        ShopWidget->OnClosed.AddDynamic(this, &ALFPWorldMapPlayerController::OnShopWidgetClosed);
        ShopWidget->AddToViewport();
    }
    else
    {
        ShopWidget->SetVisibility(ESlateVisibility::Visible);
        ShopWidget->AddToViewport();
    }
    
    // 4. Setup widget with GI, ShopID, and definition
    ShopWidget->Setup(GI, ShopNode->ShopID, ShopDefinition);
}
```

**Lines 639-649: OnShopWidgetClosed() callback**
```cpp
void ALFPWorldMapPlayerController::OnShopWidgetClosed()
{
    // Optional: Return to town UI if opened from town
    if (bReturnToTownAfterShopClose && TownWidget && TownWidget->IsInViewport())
    {
        TownWidget->SetVisibility(ESlateVisibility::Visible);
    }
    bReturnToTownAfterShopClose = false;
}
```

### 6. **Complete Data Flow**

```
CSV Data (FLFPWorldNodeRow)
    ├─ NodeID, NodeType=WNT_Shop, ShopID="shop_id_1"
    └─ Loaded into ALFPWorldMapNode

Player Interaction Flow:
    ↓
Player clicks on WNT_Shop node
    ↓
OnConfirmAction() → EnterNode(Node)
    ↓
EnterNode() switches on NodeType → WNT_Shop case
    ↓
OpenShop(Node, false)
    ├─ Get GameInstance
    ├─ Validate Node->ShopID
    ├─ Call GI->FindShopDefinition(ShopID, ShopDef)
    │   └─ ShopDataAsset->FindShopDefinition() → TMap lookup
    ├─ Create/Show ULFPShopWidget
    └─ Call ShopWidget->Setup(GI, ShopID, ShopDef)
         └─ RefreshShopUI()
            ├─ RefreshRelicList()
            │  └─ For each relic in ShopDef.RelicList:
            │     ├─ GI->FindRelicDefinition(RelicID)
            │     └─ Create button with name + price
            ├─ RefreshOwnedRelicList()
            │  └─ Display GI->GetOwnedRelicIDsArray()
            └─ RefreshDetailPanel() (for index 0 by default)

User Action: Click relic button
    ↓
OnRelicButtonClicked() → SelectedRelicIndex = new index
    ↓
RefreshDetailPanel()
    ├─ Get entry from CachedShopDefinition.RelicList[SelectedRelicIndex]
    ├─ Find definition via GI->FindRelicDefinition(entry.RelicID)
    ├─ Display icon, name, description, price
    ├─ Check GI->HasRelic(RelicID) → disable if owned
    ├─ Check GI->CanAffordGold(Price) → disable if poor
    └─ Set button enabled state

User Action: Click Purchase button
    ↓
OnPurchaseClicked()
    ├─ Get selected entry from RelicList[SelectedRelicIndex]
    └─ Call GI->TryPurchaseRelic(entry.RelicID, entry.Price)
         ├─ SpendGold(Price) → Gold -= Price
         ├─ TryAddOwnedRelic(RelicID)
         │  ├─ Validate RelicID and definition
         │  ├─ Check no duplicate
         │  └─ OwnedRelicIDs.Add(RelicID)
         └─ On success: RefreshShopUI()

User Action: Close shop
    ↓
OnCloseClicked()
    ├─ Hide widget
    └─ Broadcast OnClosed delegate
         └─ OnShopWidgetClosed() in controller
            └─ Optionally show town UI
```

### 7. **Integration with Deployment Phase**

**File: `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.cpp`, lines 217-253**

```cpp
void ULFPGameInstance::ApplyOwnedRelicsToUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit) const
{
    // Called during unit deployment/spawn in battle
    
    for (const FName& RelicID : OwnedRelicIDs)
    {
        FLFPRelicDefinition Definition;
        if (!FindRelicDefinition(RelicID, Definition))
            continue;
        
        // Apply each static effect from relic
        for (const FLFPRelicEffectEntry& Effect : Definition.Effects)
        {
            switch (Effect.EffectType)
            {
            case RET_MaxHealthFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentMaxHealth(Effect.Value);
                break;
            case RET_AttackFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentAttack(Effect.Value);
                break;
            case RET_DefenseFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentPhysicalBlock(Effect.Value);
                break;
            case RET_SpeedFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentSpeed(Effect.Value);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

This is called somewhere during `LFPDeploymentWidget` or `LFPTurnGameMode` initialization to apply all purchased relics to deployed units.

### 8. **Key Classes Summary**

| Class | File | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `ULFPRelicDataAsset` | `Shop/LFPRelicDataAsset.h` | Relic registry (RelicID → Definition map) |
| `ULFPShopDataAsset` | `Shop/LFPShopDataAsset.h` | Shop registry (ShopID → Shop Definition map) |
| `ULFPShopWidget` | `UI/WorldMap/LFPShopWidget.h` | UI widget for shopping |
| `ULFPGameInstance` | `Core/LFPGameInstance.h` | Manages relic ownership, gold, purchases, and deployment |
| `ALFPWorldMapNode` | `WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h` | World map node actor with ShopID field |
| `ALFPWorldMapPlayerController` | `WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h` | Opens shop widget on node entry |

### 9. **Data Asset Configuration Example**

**RelicDataAsset Blueprint setup:**
```
RelicMap:
  "relic_sword_dmg" → FLFPRelicDefinition
    DisplayName: "锋利之刃"
    Icon: Texture2D
    Description: "增加攻击力"
    Effects:
      [0] EffectType=RET_AttackFlat, Value=5
  "relic_armor" → FLFPRelicDefinition
    DisplayName: "铠甲"
    Effects:
      [0] EffectType=RET_DefenseFlat, Value=3

SynergyRules: []  // Empty for now
```

**ShopDataAsset Blueprint setup:**
```
ShopMap:
  "shop_id_1" → FLFPShopDefinition
    DisplayName: "遗物商店"
    RelicList:
      [0] RelicID="relic_sword_dmg", Price=100
      [1] RelicID="relic_armor", Price=80
```

**World Node CSV row:**
```
NodeID | NodeType | ShopID     | ... other fields
  5    | 2        | shop_id_1  | ...
(WNT_Shop = 2)
```

All files are organized in the shop system and integrated with the world map progression and battle deployment phases.

### 7. **Integration with Deployment Phase**

```cpp
void ULFPGameInstance::ApplyOwnedRelicsToUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit) const
{
    // Called during unit deployment/spawn in battle
    
    for (const FName& RelicID : OwnedRelicIDs)
    {
        FLFPRelicDefinition Definition;
        if (!FindRelicDefinition(RelicID, Definition))
            continue;
        
        // Apply each static effect from relic
        for (const FLFPRelicEffectEntry& Effect : Definition.Effects)
        {
            switch (Effect.EffectType)
            {
            case RET_MaxHealthFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentMaxHealth(Effect.Value);
                break;
            case RET_AttackFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentAttack(Effect.Value);
                break;
            case RET_DefenseFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentPhysicalBlock(Effect.Value);
                break;
            case RET_SpeedFlat:
                Unit->AddCurrentSpeed(Effect.Value);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

This is called somewhere during `LFPDeploymentWidget` or `LFPTurnGameMode` initialization to apply all purchased relics to deployed units.

Design a detailed implementation plan for a "Hire Market" (雇佣市场) feature in this UE5 project. This is a shop where players can buy units with gold.

## Context from Exploration

### Existing Relic Shop Pattern (to mirror):
- **Data types** (`LFPRelicTypes.h`): `FLFPShopRelicEntry` (RelicID, Price), `FLFPShopDefinition` (DisplayName, RelicList)
- **Data asset** (`LFPShopDataAsset`): `TMap<FName, FLFPShopDefinition> ShopMap`, `FindShopDefinition(ShopID, OutDef)`
- **Widget** (`LFPShopWidget`): Setup(GI, ShopID, ShopDef), RefreshShopUI, OnPurchaseClicked → GI->TryPurchaseRelic
- **GameInstance**: `ShopDataAsset`, `FindShopDefinition()`, `TryPurchaseRelic()`
- **PlayerController** (`LFPWorldMapPlayerController`): EnterNode switch → WNT_Shop → OpenShop(Node, false), ShopWidget member, ShopWidgetClass, OnShopWidgetClosed
- **World node** (`FLFPWorldNodeRow`): NodeType=WNT_Shop, ShopID field. `ALFPWorldMapNode`: ShopID property
- **CSV import/export**: Node.h has `InitFromRowData`/`ExportToRowData` for CSV fields

### Unit System:
- `FLFPUnitEntry`: TypeID (FName) + Tier (int32). Lightweight cross-level struct.
- `ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset`: TMap<FName, FLFPUnitRegistryEntry>, FindEntry(), GetUnitClass(), each entry has Icon, DisplayName, Tier, Race, BaseStats, AdvancedStats
- `ULFPGameInstance`: PartyUnits, ReserveUnits, MaxPartySize=3, MaxReserveSize=3, TryAddUnit(), IsPartyFull(), IsReserveFull()
- `ULFPUnitReplacementWidget`: Used when both party/reserve full. Setup(NewUnit, Party, Reserve, Registry), ReplacePartySlot/ReplaceReserveSlot/DiscardNewUnit, OnReplacementComplete delegate

### World Map Editor:
- `LFPWorldMapEditorComponent`: has brush params for node editing, stores current node properties
- `LFPWorldMapEditorWidget`: has UI controls for setting node properties
- Editor brush params include ShopID for shop nodes

### World Node Type Enum (`ELFPWorldNodeType` in LFPWorldMapData.h):
- WNT_Battle, WNT_Event, WNT_Shop, WNT_Town, WNT_Boss, WNT_QuestNPC, WNT_SkillNode

## Design Decisions (confirmed by user):
1. **New DataAsset**: `ULFPHireMarketDataAsset` (separate from ShopDataAsset), with HireMarketID → definition
2. **New node type**: `WNT_HireMarket` added to enum
3. **Currency**: Gold only (same as relic shop)
4. **Repeatability**: Same unit CAN be purchased multiple times (unlike relics which are unique)

## Requirements:
- Mirror the relic shop architecture as closely as possible
- Use gold currency only
- Units can be purchased repeatedly
- When party+reserve are full, need to handle overflow (leverage existing ULFPUnitReplacementWidget)
- Node on world map uses HireMarketID (like ShopID pattern)
- Need new widget ULFPHireMarketWidget

## Plan the following:

### 1. Data Layer
- Where to define new structs (new file or extend existing)
- Struct definitions: FLFPHireMarketUnitEntry, FLFPHireMarketDefinition
- ULFPHireMarketDataAsset class

### 2. GameInstance Integration
- New properties and methods needed
- Purchase logic (gold check, TryAddUnit, handle full party)

### 3. World Map Integration
- ELFPWorldNodeType enum addition
- FLFPWorldNodeRow + ALFPWorldMapNode additions (HireMarketID)
- CSV load/save updates
- World map editor integration
- PlayerController EnterNode handling

### 4. UI Widget
- ULFPHireMarketWidget design (mirror ShopWidget structure)
- What to display: unit list, detail panel with stats, purchase button
- How to handle party full scenario

### 5. File list and modification summary

Provide a concrete, step-by-step implementation plan with file paths.

input.content:
# Context

当前已有一套完整的“遗物商店”链路：世界地图节点携带 `ShopID`，`ALFPWorldMapPlayerController` 进入节点后打开 `ULFPShopWidget`，再通过 `ULFPGameInstance` 的商店/金币接口完成购买。现在要参考这套模式实现“雇佣市场”，目标是让玩家在世界地图上进入一个独立节点类型的市场，用金币购买单位，并直接接入现有的队伍/备战营系统。

本次实现采用用户已确认的约束：
- 新建独立的 `ULFPHireMarketDataAsset`，不复用 `ShopDataAsset`
- 世界地图新增独立节点类型 `WNT_HireMarket`
- 只消耗金币
- 同种单位允许重复购买

## 推荐实现方案

### 1. 新建雇佣市场数据层

新增以下文件：
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPHireMarketTypes.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPHireMarketDataAsset.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPHireMarketDataAsset.cpp`

实现内容：
- 定义 `FLFPHireMarketUnitEntry`：`UnitTypeID` + `Price`
- 定义 `FLFPHireMarketDefinition`：`DisplayName` + `UnitList`
- 定义 `ULFPHireMarketDataAsset`：`TMap<FName, FLFPHireMarketDefinition> HireMarketMap`
- 提供 `FindHireMarketDefinition()`，实现方式直接复用现有 `ULFPShopDataAsset::FindShopDefinition()` 的查表模式

可复用参考：
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPRelicTypes.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPShopDataAsset.h`

### 2. 在 GameInstance 中接入雇佣市场与购买单位逻辑

修改：
- `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.cpp`

实现内容：
- 增加 `HireMarketDataAsset` 引用
- 增加 `FindHireMarketDefinition()`
- 增加“花金币购买单位”的接口，职责建议拆成：
  - 校验 `UnitTypeID` 是否存在于 `UnitRegistry`
  - 校验金币是否足够并扣除
  - 生成 `FLFPUnitEntry`（`TypeID` + 从注册表读取的 `Tier`）
  - 返回给 UI 层决定是直接 `TryAddUnit()`，还是走替换 UI

这里不建议把“队伍已满后的替换 UI”硬塞进 `GameInstance`，因为现有 `ULFPUnitReplacementWidget` 属于 UI 流程，放在雇佣市场 Widget 内编排更自然，也更符合当前项目的职责分层。

可复用参考：
- 商店查表：`LFPGameInstance::FindShopDefinition()`
- 金币逻辑：`LFPGameInstance::SpendGold()` / `CanAffordGold()`
- 队伍接纳：`LFPGameInstance::TryAddUnit()`
- 单位数据来源：`ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset::FindEntry()` / `GetUnitTier()`

### 3. 世界地图节点与 CSV 数据扩展为雇佣市场

修改：
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.cpp`

实现内容：
- 在 `ELFPWorldNodeType` 中新增 `WNT_HireMarket`
- 在 `FLFPWorldNodeRow` 中新增 `HireMarketID`
- 在 `ALFPWorldMapNode` 中新增 `HireMarketID`
- 在 `InitFromRowData()` / `ExportToRowData()` 中读写 `HireMarketID`

这样世界地图 CSV、运行时节点、编辑器三层会继续保持现在的同构设计。

可复用参考：
- 现有 `ShopID` 字段链路：`LFPWorldMapData.h` + `LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp`

### 4. 扩展世界地图编辑器，支持配置雇佣市场节点

修改：
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.cpp`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.cpp`

实现内容：
- 在编辑器笔刷中新增 `BrushHireMarketID`
- 放置节点 / 套用节点参数时，把 `BrushHireMarketID` 写入节点
- 在编辑器 Widget 中新增 `HireMarketIDInput`
- 节点类型下拉框新增 `WNT_HireMarket`
- 选中节点信息时显示并回填 `HireMarketID`

这样编辑体验会和现有 `ShopID` 配置方式一致。

可复用参考：
- `BrushShopID` 与 `OnShopIDChanged()` 的整条实现
- `UpdateNodeInfo()` 里对 `WNT_Shop` 的显示逻辑

### 5. 新建雇佣市场 UI，整体镜像遗物商店

新增以下文件：
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPHireMarketWidget.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPHireMarketWidget.cpp`

实现内容：
- 新建 `ULFPHireMarketWidget`，整体结构尽量镜像 `ULFPShopWidget`
- `Setup(GI, HireMarketID, Definition)` 缓存数据并刷新 UI
- 左侧列表显示可购买单位（名字 + 价格）
- 右侧详情显示单位图标、名称、Tier、种族、基础属性/高级属性摘要
- 购买按钮只根据金币是否足够决定可用性，不做“已拥有”限制
- 点击购买后：
  1. 向 `GameInstance` 请求扣钱并生成 `FLFPUnitEntry`
  2. 先尝试 `TryAddUnit()`
  3. 若队伍与备战营都满，则复用 `ULFPUnitReplacementWidget` 让玩家选择替换或丢弃
  4. 购买完成后刷新金币与列表状态

建议不要把“已购买一次后变灰”加进来，因为用户已确认允许重复购买。

可复用参考：
- UI骨架：`Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPShopWidget.h/.cpp`
- 单位展示数据：`Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPUnitRegistryDataAsset.h`
- 满编替换：`Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPUnitReplacementWidget.h/.cpp`

### 6. 在世界地图玩家控制器中增加雇佣市场入口

修改：
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp`

实现内容：
- 增加 `HireMarketWidgetClass` / `HireMarketWidget`
- 增加 `OpenHireMarket()` / `OnHireMarketWidgetClosed()`
- 在 `EnterNode()` 的 switch 中新增 `WNT_HireMarket` 分支
- `OpenHireMarket()` 的结构直接镜像现有 `OpenShop()`：
  - 读 `HireMarketID`
  - `GI->FindHireMarketDefinition()`
  - 创建/显示 `ULFPHireMarketWidget`
  - 调 `Setup()`

这样运行时入口会完全贴合现有商店实现，后续维护成本最低。

可复用参考：
- `EnterNode()` 中的 `WNT_Shop`
- `OpenShop()` / `OnShopWidgetClosed()`

### 7. Town 建筑入口先保持最小实现

本轮建议先只实现“世界地图独立节点型雇佣市场”，暂不把 Town 建筑系统一起扩到 `HireMarket`。

原因：
- 用户当前明确目标是“参考遗物商店实现雇佣市场”，核心链路是独立商店节点
- 现有 Town 建筑枚举、TownWidget、编辑器勾选项会带来额外改动面
- 可以先把主链路跑通，再看是否需要把 Town 也接入

如果后续要接 Town，可按当前 `TBT_Shop` 的模式追加，不会和本轮方案冲突。

## 关键复用点

优先复用以下已有实现，不额外发明新模式：
- 商店数据资产查表：`Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPShopDataAsset.h`
- 商店打开流程：`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp`
- 商店 UI 刷新模式：`Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPShopWidget.cpp`
- 金币系统：`Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h/.cpp`
- 单位注册表：`Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPUnitRegistryDataAsset.h/.cpp`
- 单位入队：`Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance::TryAddUnit()`
- 满编替换 UI：`Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPUnitReplacementWidget.h/.cpp`
- 世界地图节点 CSV 同步：`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.cpp`
- 世界地图编辑器笔刷同步：`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.*` + `UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.*`

## 预计修改文件

新增：
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPHireMarketTypes.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPHireMarketDataAsset.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Shop/LFPHireMarketDataAsset.cpp`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPHireMarketWidget.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPHireMarketWidget.cpp`

修改：
- `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.cpp`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.cpp`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.cpp`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.cpp`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h`
- `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp`

## 验证方式

### 代码验证
- 编译 `LFP2D` 模块，确认新增类型、头文件引用、UCLASS/USTRUCT 反射都通过
- 检查世界地图节点 CSV 的导入/导出没有丢字段

### 运行验证
1. 创建 `HireMarketDataAsset`，配置至少一个 `HireMarketID`
2. 在世界地图编辑器中放置 `WNT_HireMarket` 节点并填写 `HireMarketID`
3. 保存并重新加载地图，确认节点类型和 `HireMarketID` 能正确回读
4. 进入雇佣市场节点，确认能打开 `HireMarketWidget`
5. 金币足够时购买单位：
   - 队伍未满时进入 `PartyUnits`
   - 队伍满且备战营未满时进入 `ReserveUnits`
6. 队伍和备战营都满时购买单位：
   - 弹出 `UnitReplacementWidget`
   - 测试替换队伍、替换备战营、丢弃新单位三条路径
7. 测试同一单位重复购买，确认不会被“已拥有”逻辑拦截
8. 金币不足时购买按钮应禁用或购买失败且不扣钱

### UE 编辑器手动配置
- 新建 `WBP_HireMarket`（父类 `ULFPHireMarketWidget`）
- 在 `BP_WorldMapPlayerController` 上配置 `HireMarketWidgetClass`
- 在 `GameInstance` 蓝图上配置 `HireMarketDataAsset`
- 为 `WNT_HireMarket` 配置节点视觉数据资产

1→#pragma once

     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Engine/GameInstance.h"
     5→#include "LFP2D/Unit/LFPUnitTypes.h"
     6→#include "LFP2D/Shop/LFPRelicTypes.h"
     7→#include "LFPGameInstance.generated.h"
     8→
     9→class ALFPTacticsUnit;
    10→class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
    11→class ULFPRelicDataAsset;
    12→class ULFPShopDataAsset;
    13→
    14→// 战斗请求：世界地图 → 战斗场景传递的数据
    15→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    16→struct FLFPBattleRequest
    17→{
    18→	GENERATED_BODY()
    19→
    20→	// 触发战斗的节点 ID
    21→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    22→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    23→
    24→	// 战斗地图 CSV 文件名（对应 Saved/Maps/ 下的 CSV）
    25→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    26→	FString BattleMapName;
    27→
    28→	// 敌人星级
    29→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    30→	int32 StarRating = 1;
    31→
    32→	// 是否可逃跑
    33→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    34→	bool bCanEscape = true;
    35→
    36→	// 节点基础金币奖励
    37→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    38→	int32 BaseGoldReward = 0;
    39→
    40→	// 节点基础食物奖励
    41→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    42→	int32 BaseFoodReward = 0;
    43→
    44→	// 是否有有效请求
    45→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    46→	bool bIsValid = false;
    47→};
    48→
    49→// 战斗结果：战斗场景 → 世界地图传递的数据
    50→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    51→struct FLFPBattleResult
    52→{
    53→	GENERATED_BODY()
    54→
    55→	// 对应的节点 ID
    56→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    57→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    58→
    59→	// 是否胜利
    60→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    61→	bool bVictory = false;
    62→
    63→	// 是否逃跑
    64→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    65→	bool bEscaped = false;
    66→
    67→	// 战斗中捕获的单位列表（背叛系统触发）
    68→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    69→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> CapturedUnits;
    70→
    71→	// 总金币奖励（基础 + 击杀掉落）
    72→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    73→	int32 GoldReward = 0;
    74→
    75→	// 总食物奖励（基础 + 击杀掉落）
    76→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    77→	int32 FoodReward = 0;
    78→
    79→	// 是否有有效结果
    80→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    81→	bool bIsValid = false;
    82→};
    83→
    84→// 世界地图状态快照：跨关卡保持
    85→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    86→struct FLFPWorldMapSnapshot
    87→{
    88→	GENERATED_BODY()
    89→
    90→	// 当前世界地图名
    91→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    92→	FString WorldMapName;
    93→
    94→	// 玩家当前节点 ID
    95→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    96→	int32 CurrentNodeID = 0;
    97→
    98→	// 已消耗回合数
    99→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   100→	int32 CurrentTurn = 0;
   101→
   102→	// 已访问节点
   103→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   104→	TSet<int32> VisitedNodeIDs;
   105→
   106→	// 已揭露节点
   107→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   108→	TSet<int32> RevealedNodeIDs;
   109→
   110→	// 已触发节点（战斗/事件/Boss 首次触发后不再触发）
   111→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   112→	TSet<int32> TriggeredNodeIDs;
   113→
   114→	// 是否有有效快照
   115→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   116→	bool bIsValid = false;
   117→};
   118→
   119→/**
   120→ * 游戏实例：跨关卡生命周期
   121→ * 负责世界地图 ↔ 战斗场景之间的状态传递
   122→ */
   123→UCLASS()
   124→class LFP2D_API ULFPGameInstance : public UGameInstance
   125→{
   126→	GENERATED_BODY()
   127→
   128→public:
   129→	// ============== 战斗请求/结果 ==============
   130→
   131→	// 设置战斗请求（世界地图调用，进入战斗前）
   132→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   133→	void SetBattleRequest(const FLFPBattleRequest& Request);
   134→
   135→	// 获取战斗请求（战斗场景调用，读取后清除）
   136→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   137→	FLFPBattleRequest ConsumeBattleRequest();
   138→
   139→	// 设置战斗结果（战斗场景调用，结束战斗时）
   140→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   141→	void SetBattleResult(const FLFPBattleResult& Result);
   142→
   143→	// 获取战斗结果（世界地图调用，读取后清除）
   144→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   145→	FLFPBattleResult ConsumeBattleResult();
   146→
   147→	// ============== 世界地图快照 ==============
   148→
   149→	// 保存世界地图状态快照
   150→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   151→	void SaveWorldMapSnapshot(const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& Snapshot);
   152→
   153→	// 获取世界地图快照（不清除，世界地图关卡可多次读取）
   154→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   155→	const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& GetWorldMapSnapshot() const { return WorldMapSnapshot; }
   156→
   157→	// 是否有待处理的战斗结果
   158→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   159→	bool HasPendingBattleResult() const { return PendingBattleResult.bIsValid; }
   160→
   161→	// ============== 场景切换 ==============
   162→
   163→	// 切换到战斗场景（带淡出过场）
   164→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   165→	void TransitionToBattle(const FString& BattleLevelName);
   166→
   167→	// 切换回世界地图（带淡出过场）
   168→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   169→	void TransitionToWorldMap(const FString& WorldMapLevelName);
   170→
   171→	// 过场动画时长（秒）
   172→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   173→	float TransitionFadeDuration = 0.5f;
   174→
   175→	// 是否正在过场中（防止重复触发）
   176→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Scene Transition")
   177→	bool bIsTransitioning = false;
   178→
   179→	// 世界地图关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   180→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   181→	FString DefaultWorldMapLevelName = TEXT("Test_WorldMap");
   182→
   183→	// 战斗关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   184→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   185→	FString DefaultBattleLevelName = TEXT("Test_Fight");
   186→
   187→	// ============== 编队系统 ==============
   188→
   189→	// ============== 资源系统 ==============
   190→
   191→	// 金币
   192→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Resources")
   193→	int32 Gold = 0;
   194→
   195→	// 食物
   196→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Resources")
   197→	int32 Food = 0;
   198→
   199→	// 增加金币
   200→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Resources")
   201→	void AddGold(int32 Amount);
   202→
   203→	// 增加食物
   204→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Resources")
   205→	void AddFood(int32 Amount);
   206→
   207→	// 获取金币
   208→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Resources")
   209→	int32 GetGold() const { return Gold; }
   210→
   211→	// 获取食物
   212→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Resources")
   213→	int32 GetFood() const { return Food; }
   214→
   215→	// 是否有足够金币
   216→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Resources")
   217→	bool CanAffordGold(int32 Amount) const { return Gold >= Amount; }
   218→
   219→	// 扣除金币
   220→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Resources")
   221→	bool SpendGold(int32 Amount);
   222→
   223→	// ============== 遗物 / 商店系统 ==============
   224→
   225→	// 遗物数据资产
   226→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Relic")
   227→	TObjectPtr<ULFPRelicDataAsset> RelicDataAsset;
   228→
   229→	// 商店数据资产
   230→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Shop")
   231→	TObjectPtr<ULFPShopDataAsset> ShopDataAsset;
   232→
   233→	// 已拥有遗物 ID 集合
   234→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Relic")
   235→	TSet<FName> OwnedRelicIDs;
   236→
   237→	// 是否已拥有遗物
   238→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Relic")
   239→	bool HasRelic(FName RelicID) const;
   240→
   241→	// 尝试将遗物加入已拥有列表
   242→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Relic")
   243→	bool TryAddOwnedRelic(FName RelicID);
   244→
   245→	// 获取已拥有遗物 ID 列表
   246→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Relic")
   247→	TArray<FName> GetOwnedRelicIDsArray() const;
   248→
   249→	// 查找遗物定义
   250→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Relic")
   251→	bool FindRelicDefinition(FName RelicID, FLFPRelicDefinition& OutDefinition) const;
   252→
   253→	// 查找商店定义
   254→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Shop")
   255→	bool FindShopDefinition(FName ShopID, FLFPShopDefinition& OutDefinition) const;
   256→
   257→	// 购买遗物
   258→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Shop")
   259→	bool TryPurchaseRelic(FName RelicID, int32 Price);
   260→
   261→	// 将已拥有遗物效果应用到单位当前属性
   262→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Relic")
   263→	void ApplyOwnedRelicsToUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit) const;
   264→
   265→	// ============== 编队系统 ==============
   266→
   267→	// 单位注册表（蓝图中配置，全局唯一）
   268→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   269→	TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
   270→
   271→	// 出战队伍
   272→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   273→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> PartyUnits;
   274→
   275→	// 备战营
   276→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   277→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> ReserveUnits;
   278→
   279→	// 出战队伍上限
   280→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   281→	int32 MaxPartySize = 3;
   282→
   283→	// 备战营上限
   284→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   285→	int32 MaxReserveSize = 3;
   286→
   287→	// 尝试添加单位：先队伍 → 再备战 → 都满返回 false
   288→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   289→	bool TryAddUnit(const FLFPUnitEntry& Unit);
   290→
   291→	// 队伍是否已满
   292→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   293→	bool IsPartyFull() const { return PartyUnits.Num() >= MaxPartySize; }
   294→
   295→	// 备战营是否已满
   296→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   297→	bool IsReserveFull() const { return ReserveUnits.Num() >= MaxReserveSize; }
   298→
   299→	// 替换队伍中的单位
   300→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   301→	void ReplacePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
